diagnosis_used.diagnosis: Branded trend is declining; likely pressure from interruption shortage, ratio overfitting, package variance high.
recommended_adjustments: Explore +1 interruption/non-engine slot in meta builds.

Constrain package ratio swings and retest with more runs.
